sap_business_one.name: SAP Business One

production_shop_floor.sku_name: SAP Business One Manufacturing & Production Module
production_shop_floor.notes: Production planning, shop floor control, BOM management, and MRP are native features included in SAP Business One's standard manufacturing module. Not sold separately. Third-party add-ons exist for advanced functionality (400+ available), but core functionality is bundled.

quality_inventory.sku_name: SAP Business One Inventory Management Module & Quality Management Features
quality_inventory.notes: Batch/lot/serial tracking, quality inspections, traceability, and inventory management are native features included in the core platform. SAP Business Network Material Traceability is a separate cloud service, but foundational quality & traceability is bundled with standard licenses.

sap_business_one.overall_summary: SAP Business One packages both production planning/shop floor and quality/inventory traceability as bundled components of its core Manufacturing and Inventory Management modules. Neither core is sold as a separate SKU. The ERP uses named-user licensing priced at approximately $95–$250/user/month for cloud deployments or $3,500–$5,500 per user as a perpetual on-premise license, plus 18–20% annual maintenance. While over 400 third-party add-ons exist for advanced manufacturing and quality functionality, basic production planning, shop floor control, quality management, batch traceability, and inventory management are included standard across all Professional and Limited User licenses.

sage_300.name: Sage 300

production_shop_floor.notes: Sage 300 documentation lists Shop Floor Control as a module component, but web sources do not confirm if it is separately licensed or bundled within manufacturing suite. Appears to be offered as an add-on based on third-party implementation sites.

quality_inventory.sku_name: Sage 300 Inventory Control + Manufacturing Lot Tracking
quality_inventory.notes: Lot and Serial Tracking appear to be built into core Inventory Control module, but Manufacturing Lot Tracking is listed as a separate add-on. Unclear if quality/lot traceability is bundled or requires additional licensing.

sage_300.overall_summary: Web sources confirm Sage 300 includes manufacturing shop floor control and inventory/lot traceability capabilities, but do not definitively establish whether these are sold as separate SKUs, bundled at no cost, or partially available with paid add-ons. Official Sage 300 pricing documentation pricing at $75-200/user/month but does not break down module-specific costs. Recommend contacting Sage directly or a certified partner for authoritative SKU and pricing details.

globe3_erp.name: Globe3 ERP

production_shop_floor.notes: No separate SKU documentation found. Features (production planning, scheduling) mentioned but pricing model unclear. Vendor uses custom quotes.

quality_inventory.notes: QA and Inventory described as integrated within Manufacturing/MRP. No separate add-on pricing documented. All modules bundled in standard system.

globe3_erp.overall_summary: Globe3 ERP uses an integrated, bundled licensing model where manufacturing cores (production planning, quality, inventory) are sold as part of the Manufacturing/MRP module within the broader ERP suite. Per-concurrent-user pricing applies to entire system. No publicly available evidence of separate SKUs or add-on pricing for individual manufacturing sub-components. Vendor contact required for detailed module-level pricing.

netsuite.name: Oracle NetSuite ERP

production_shop_floor.sku_name: NetSuite Advanced Manufacturing (with Work Orders & Assemblies + WIP & Routings prerequisites)
production_shop_floor.notes: Advanced Manufacturing is a separate add-on module priced independently. Production planning & shop floor capabilities are provided through tiered modules: Work Orders & Assemblies (basic), WIP & Routings (intermediate), and Advanced Manufacturing (comprehensive). Oracle does not publish exact pricing; custom quotes required based on user count and configuration.

quality_inventory.notes: Inventory management (basic tracking, lot/serial numbers, replenishment) is included in the core platform. Quality Management is a separate optional add-on module for advanced quality control, inspections, and traceability. Advanced Inventory Management ($~500/month) available separately for multi-location demand planning and advanced controls.

netsuite.overall_summary: Oracle NetSuite ERP packages manufacturing functionality across multiple tiers rather than as a single unified module. Production planning & shop floor represents 'separate' licensing through Advanced Manufacturing and supporting modules (Work Orders & Assemblies, WIP & Routings), priced as distinct add-ons. Quality & inventory traceability follows a 'partial' model where base inventory management is bundled in core, but Quality Management is a separate licensed add-on. All modules are licensed independently per user per month on top of the $999/month base platform fee. Exact pricing is not published by Oracle; implementation varies by contract negotiation, company size, and user count.

odoo.name: Odoo Online (Standard)

production_shop_floor.notes: Shop Floor is a companion module to Manufacturing, automatically installed together with it at no separate cost. However, Shop Floor functionality is Enterprise-only and not available in Community Edition.

quality_inventory.notes: Inventory module with basic lot/serial tracking is included in Standard plan. Quality module (for advanced quality control, inspection points, test results) is Enterprise-only and not available in Odoo Online Standard. Traceability features exist in Inventory but full quality management is a separate paid Enterprise feature.

odoo.overall_summary: Both cores are partially supported in Odoo Online (Standard). Production planning and shop floor management are bundled within the Manufacturing module at no extra cost, though advanced Shop Floor features are restricted to Enterprise. Quality and inventory traceability have foundational features (lots, serial numbers) included in Inventory, but comprehensive quality control requiring the Quality module is Enterprise-only and not available on Odoo Online Standard plan. The Standard plan includes 'hundreds of apps' for a single price (~$24.90/user/month USD), but certain advanced features default to the Custom/Enterprise plan.

ms_dynamics_bc.name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central

production_shop_floor.notes: Production planning & shop floor execution (production orders, capacity planning, routings, finite scheduling) are included in the Premium license ($110/user/month as of Oct 2025) with no separate SKU. Advanced shop floor features beyond native capabilities require AppSource extensions (e.g., Shop Floor Mobile, MxAPS).

quality_inventory.sku_name: Dynamics 365 Business Central Premium (base) + Quality Management module
quality_inventory.notes: Inventory traceability (lot/serial tracking, multi-location, warehouse management) is bundled in Premium. Native quality management (inspection records, batch attributes, pass/fail tracking) launched as built-in module. Advanced quality enforcement and traceability require third-party apps (e.g., Warehouse Insight, Shop Floor Insight).

ms_dynamics_bc.overall_summary: <cite index="41-1,49-9">Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Premium includes manufacturing capabilities bundled with the platform at $110/user/month</cite>. <cite index="17-6">The manufacturing module is included exclusively in the Premium license</cite>, not sold separately. <cite index="21-1,21-13,21-14,21-15">Quality inspection records and batch attributes are natively supported in Business Central, allowing users to document inspections and record pass/fail outcomes, though native Business Central does not enforce inspection results automatically within warehouse or production workflows</cite>. <cite index="6-17,17-10,17-11">Advanced manufacturing and warehousing often require third-party apps from AppSource</cite>. Thus, production_shop_floor is fully **bundled** in Premium, while quality_inventory is **partial**—base traceability is bundled, but full advanced quality enforcement requires add-ons.

erpnext.name: ERPNext (Frappe Cloud)

production_shop_floor.sku_name: ERPNext Manufacturing Module (included in base platform)
production_shop_floor.pricing_unit: No per-module licensing; hosting cost is per-compute/month
production_shop_floor.notes: Production planning, shop floor control, work orders, and job cards are all core features included in the base Manufacturing module. No separate SKU or additional licensing fee. Costs are only for Frappe Cloud hosting (~$5-$400/month depending on compute tier) or self-hosting infrastructure.

quality_inventory.sku_name: ERPNext Quality Control & Inventory Management Modules (included in base platform)
quality_inventory.pricing_unit: No per-module licensing; hosting cost is per-compute/month
quality_inventory.notes: Quality management (inspections, batch/serial traceability) and inventory management (stock tracking, multi-location control, batch/serial numbers) are both core modules included in base ERPNext. No separate licensing; same compute-based pricing applies to all modules.

erpnext.overall_summary: ERPNext (Frappe Cloud) operates as a 100% open-source ERP with no per-module, per-user, or per-feature licensing fees. Both 'production_shop_floor' and 'quality_inventory' cores are fully bundled into the base Manufacturing and Inventory modules at no additional cost. All modules—including production planning, shop floor control, quality inspections, batch/serial traceability, and inventory management—are included in every instance. Pricing is solely based on Frappe Cloud hosting compute resources ($5/month shared to $400+/month dedicated), not on software licensing or feature activation. This represents a fundamental packaging difference vs. traditional vendor-specific ERPs (SAP, Oracle, Odoo Enterprise) which charge separately per module and per user.

ibm_maximo.name: IBM Maximo Application Suite

production_shop_floor.sku_name: Not applicable - not an integrated Maximo module
production_shop_floor.notes: IBM Maximo is an EAM (Enterprise Asset Management) system, not a manufacturing ERP. Production planning and shop floor functionality are external to Maximo and would be sourced from a true ERP or MES system.

quality_inventory.sku_name: Maximo Manage (core) - Inventory module + Visual Inspection add-on for quality
quality_inventory.notes: Inventory management is bundled in Maximo Manage core (no extra cost). Quality management requires separate Visual Inspection or Manage HSE add-ons; basic quality/traceability functions (calibration) are bundled, but full quality module functionality is add-on based.

ibm_maximo.overall_summary: IBM Maximo Application Suite is not a manufacturing ERP in the traditional sense. It is a best-of-breed asset and enterprise asset management (EAM) solution. Production planning and shop floor management are absent from Maximo's functional footprint. Inventory is bundled in the core Maximo Manage offering under a unified AppPoints licensing model. Quality/traceability has partial support—basic calibration and traceability are included in Maximo Manage, but advanced quality management requires separate add-ons such as Visual Inspection or Health, Safety & Environment modules. For true manufacturing ERP capabilities (MRP, production scheduling, shop floor control), integration with a dedicated ERP (SAP, Oracle, Infor) is required.

upkeep.name: UpKeep CMMS

production_shop_floor.sku_name: Not applicable - UpKeep is CMMS, not ERP with manufacturing modules
production_shop_floor.notes: UpKeep does not segment shop floor planning as a distinct core. Work order and preventive maintenance features are included in all paid tiers starting at $24/user/month.

quality_inventory.sku_name: Not applicable - UpKeep is CMMS, not ERP with manufacturing modules
quality_inventory.notes: UpKeep includes inventory management within tiered plans (Premium tier at $55/user/month adds inventory costing). Quality/safety features are in separate EHS product.

upkeep.overall_summary: UpKeep CMMS does not match the evaluation criteria. It is not an ERP with a manufacturing_management module split into distinct cores. It is a mobile-first CMMS with bundled maintenance, asset, inventory, and basic quality features across tiered per-user pricing ($20–$55+/month), not separate SKUs.

coupa.name: Coupa Procurement

production_shop_floor.notes: Coupa offers Supply Chain Design & Planning (production planning at strategic level via LLamasoft acquisition) but no shop-floor production scheduling, MRP, or Advanced Planning & Scheduling (APS) capabilities. No dedicated production_shop_floor module exists.

quality_inventory.notes: Coupa includes basic inventory tracking and supplier-managed inventory collaboration, but lacks dedicated quality management or traceability (serialization/lot tracking) needed for manufacturing. Quality collaboration features exist but are minimal.

coupa.overall_summary: Coupa Procurement is not a manufacturing ERP. It is a procurement/BSM platform. Production shop floor planning is absent entirely. Inventory management is included as a basic feature within the core Procure-to-Pay module but lacks manufacturing-grade quality management and full traceability capabilities. Coupa acquired LLamasoft for supply chain design & planning at the strategic (network design) level, not tactical shop-floor execution.

workday_hcm.name: Workday HCM

production_shop_floor.sku_name: N/A - Not offered by Workday HCM
production_shop_floor.notes: Workday lacks native production planning and shop floor execution capabilities. Manufacturing organizations requiring these functions must implement third-party add-ons or use separate systems alongside Workday HCM, which focuses on HR/finance rather than manufacturing operations.

quality_inventory.sku_name: Workday Inventory (internal supply chain); Quality/traceability via Prism Analytics integration
quality_inventory.pricing_unit: per_employee_month (bundled with core modules); add-on modules priced separately
quality_inventory.notes: Workday offers basic inventory management (internal supply chain, replenishment, recall management) as part of its spend management suite. Quality traceability requires Prism Analytics (advanced feature, separate pricing). Advanced manufacturing quality management and lot/serial traceability for production require external integrations or add-ons.

workday_hcm.overall_summary: Workday HCM is fundamentally an HR and financial management platform, not a complete ERP. Both evaluated manufacturing management cores fall short of traditional ERP capabilities: production_shop_floor is entirely absent from Workday's native offering, requiring external tools. quality_inventory is partially supported through Workday Inventory (internal supply chain focus) plus optional Prism Analytics, but lacks comprehensive manufacturing quality, lot tracking, and production-level traceability features found in dedicated manufacturing ERPs.

adp.name: ADP Workforce Now

production_shop_floor.notes: ADP Workforce Now is an HCM (Human Capital Management) platform focused on payroll, HR, benefits, time tracking, and talent management. It does not include manufacturing-specific production planning or shop floor management modules.

quality_inventory.notes: ADP Workforce Now does not include quality management or inventory traceability modules. These are manufacturing operations functions outside the scope of this HCM platform.

adp.overall_summary: ADP Workforce Now is a Human Capital Management (HCM) platform, not an ERP system with manufacturing management capabilities. It focuses on payroll, HR administration, benefits, time and attendance, talent acquisition, and workforce management. The requested manufacturing management module 'cores' (production planning & shop floor, and quality & inventory traceability) are not supported by ADP Workforce Now. ADP does not appear to offer a distinct manufacturing ERP module. Organizations seeking manufacturing-specific ERP functionality would need alternative solutions such as SAP, NetSuite, or other manufacturing-focused ERP vendors.

bamboohr.name: BambooHR

production_shop_floor.notes: BambooHR is an HR/HRIS platform with no manufacturing operations modules. It does not support production planning or shop floor functionality.

quality_inventory.notes: BambooHR is an HR/HRIS platform with no quality management or inventory management modules. These functions are not supported.

bamboohr.overall_summary: BambooHR is an HR/HRIS (Human Resource Information System) platform designed for small to mid-sized businesses, not a manufacturing ERP. It provides HR functions (employee records, payroll, benefits, time tracking, onboarding, performance management) but does not include any manufacturing management modules. The requested evaluation cannot be completed as neither core (production_shop_floor, quality_inventory) exists in this product's feature set.

sap_business_one.name: SAP Business One

eam_register_lifecycle.sku_name: SAP Business One - Fixed Assets Management
eam_register_lifecycle.notes: Fixed asset register and lifecycle management appear to be part of SAP Business One's core Financial Management module, not sold separately. Exact packaging model (bundled vs. partial) could not be confirmed from web sources.

cmms_maintenance_ops.sku_name: SAP Business One for Service & Maintenance
cmms_maintenance_ops.notes: Service & Maintenance functionality is marketed as part of SAP Business One's integrated service module. No separate pricing tier or SKU designation found in public sources. CMMS is referenced as an add-on capability rather than a separately-licensable core.

sap_business_one.overall_summary: Web sources do not provide sufficient detail to classify how SAP Business One packages these two functional cores. Both asset management and maintenance operations appear to be included within SAP Business One's bundled offering, but the exact packaging model (separate, bundled, or partial) cannot be confirmed. SAP Business One uses per-user naming licenses (Professional or Limited) rather than functional core-level SKUs. Further clarification from SAP directly would be required to validate the specific packaging and licensing structure for these cores.

sage_300.name: Sage 300

eam_register_lifecycle.notes: Asset lifecycle management is not natively included in Sage 300 core. Available via third-party add-ons (Norming Asset Management, Sage Fixed Assets) sold separately.

cmms_maintenance_ops.notes: CMMS functionality not natively bundled. Requires third-party solutions (Technisoft Service Manager, DimoMaint CMMS, others) sold as separate add-ons.

sage_300.overall_summary: Sage 300 does not natively include either EAM asset register/lifecycle or CMMS maintenance operations cores. Both functional areas require acquisition of third-party add-on solutions. The product concentrates on financial management, inventory, and basic fixed asset accounting. Asset management and maintenance management are extended through certified partner integrations only.

globe3_erp.name: Globe3 ERP

eam_register_lifecycle.notes: Web sources confirm Globe3 includes Asset Management module with lifecycle tracking but do not specify whether EAM register/lifecycle is sold separately, bundled, or partial.

cmms_maintenance_ops.notes: Web sources mention 'Maintenance Contracts' as a Globe3 feature but do not detail CMMS packaging or licensing model.

globe3_erp.overall_summary: Globe3 ERP documentation available online does not provide granular SKU-level or functional core-level packaging and pricing details. The product is marketed as an integrated, bundled suite with per-user/concurrent-user licensing. To obtain the specific packaging and licensing information for these two cores, contact Globe3 sales directly.

netsuite.name: Oracle NetSuite ERP

eam_register_lifecycle.notes: Only fixed asset depreciation & lifecycle tracking included; full EAM asset register features require third-party SuiteApp supplements like Shepherd.

cmms_maintenance_ops.notes: NetSuite ERP does not include native CMMS. Maintenance operations require separate third-party CMMS systems (Shepherd, Limble, Tractian, MaintainX, etc.) integrated via APIs.

netsuite.overall_summary: Oracle NetSuite ERP does not package these two asset management cores as you have specified. Fixed Assets Management ($599/month) provides partial asset lifecycle tracking but lacks full EAM capabilities. CMMS maintenance operations are entirely absent from NetSuite and must be sourced from dedicated third-party maintenance vendors. NetSuite functions as the financial backbone, with external CMMS platforms handling shop-floor maintenance data via REST/API integration.
